generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local news report about how expanded domestic security powers helped stop a potential terror attack in our state last month. The new measures worked exactly as intended - no mass surveillance, just targeted monitoring of known threats. Why are some people still so against giving our law enforcement the tools they need to keep us safe? #CommonSenseSecurity #SupportOurOfficers
